## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new employees Kavishka and Erik, providing an overview of day one and first week expectations at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Day 1 focus: Set up tools (1Password, Slack, Notion, Zoom) and meet managers](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Week 1: Read company articles, attend meetings, complete onboarding tasks in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX offers unlimited PTO and a lucrative employee referral program ($5k-$10k)](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [4hr overlap with Pacific Time required; daily Geekbot updates expected](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Topics

### Introductions

  - [Alice: EA at GrowthX (1yr), based in Nairobi, supports engineering/operations](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Erik: New account strategist, AI strategy background, enjoys biking/cooking](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Kavishka: New content manager, AI/SEO/marketing experience, gym enthusiast](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [Notion handbook: Central resource for onboarding materials](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Linear: Project management tool for tracking onboarding tasks](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Day 1: Tool setup, manager meeting, onboarding buddy assignment](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Week 1: Read company articles, attend meetings, complete Linear tasks](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Company Policies

  - [Unlimited PTO: No approval needed, book in advance on shared calendar](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Employee Referral: $10k for engineering roles, $5k for non-engineering (6-month retention)](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [4-hour overlap with Pacific Time required](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Daily Geekbot updates for team communication](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Tools and Access

  - [1Password for secure logins](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Slack for communication (IT and tools channel for support)](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Notion for knowledge management](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Linear for project/task management](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - <team@growthxlabs.com> email for tool access and client communication

### Upcoming Meetings

  - [CEO (Marcel) meeting: Thursday, September 4th](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Sales lead (Kyle) meeting: Friday, September 5th](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Biweekly all-hands (next week): New hires to introduce themselves](https://fathom.video/share/ayVdneqswuqs7RHoaqCwmwHs-kzxzhPa?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
